stats.district_name: NY State Senate District 20 (Zellnor Myrie) — Central Brooklyn
stats.source: Census Reporter, ACS 2024 5-year (2020-2024). Race/ethnicity computed from table B03002 (White/Black/Asian = alone, non-Hispanic; Hispanic = all races). Population/income/age/foreign-born from profile (DP05/DP03). https://censusreporter.org/profiles/61000US36020-state-senate-district-20-ny/

turnout.notes: Zellnor Myrie (D), Central Brooklyn, entirely in Kings County. SOLID. General total 108,212 = Myrie 107,498 (only line, ran unopposed) + 714 write-ins; 128,090 total ballots cast (19,878 blank/undervote). Source: NYC BOE certified Kings recap https://vote.nyc/sites/default/files/pdf/election_results/2024/20241105General%20Election/00302000020Kings%20State%20Senator%2020th%20Senatorial%20District%20Recap.pdf ; matches Wikipedia exactly. NO June 2024 Democratic primary (Myrie re-elected without challengers) so no primary count. Registered voters/turnout %% not found per district.

_prov.source: Census Reporter ACS 2020-2024 5-yr (demographics); NYC BOE certified recaps (turnout) — compiled 2026-07-02 for the district-comparison map
_prov.caveats: Headline demographics use ACS 2020-24; the charts on this page use ACS 2019-23 — two adjacent vintages, so small differences between them are expected.

city.name: New York city
city.source: U.S. Census Bureau, ACS 2020-2024 5-year, place 'New York city, NY' (tables B19013, B01002, B05002), via Census API
